name: North HVAC Services
tagline: Family-owned heating & air conditioning, trusted across Sonoma and Marin since 1988.
seoDescription: North HVAC Services is a family-owned heating, cooling, and air quality company serving Petaluma and Sonoma & Marin Counties

sections.heading: Comfort you can count on, all year round
sections.subheading: North HVAC Services is a family-owned heating and air conditioning company keeping Petaluma, Sonoma, and Marin homes comfortable since 1988.

sections.heading: Your neighbors in home comfort
body: North HVAC Services is a family-owned, full-service heating and air conditioning business dedicated to keeping homes throughout Sonoma and Marin Counties comfortable and safe year round. Established in 1988, the company's owners bring more than 48 years of combined experience in the trade, and our friends and neighbors have trusted us to care for their homes for decades.

We're a true family operation. Chris, a well-rounded journeyman who leads the company, partnered with the original owner in 2019 and brought on his brother Paul as a skilled service technician, along with installation manager Ivan. From the owners to our installers, technicians, and office staff, we're committed to quality craftsmanship and honest customer service at fair prices.
highlights: Mitsubishi Diamond Authorized Dealer & Trane Factory Dealer
A+ rated with the Better Business Bureau

items.title: Heating Installation & Repair
items.description: Gas furnace repair, maintenance, and high-efficiency replacements to keep your home warm through the coldest North Bay nights.

items.title: Air Conditioning
items.description: AC repair, tune-ups, and new system installations sized right for your home so you stay cool and energy-efficient all summer.

items.title: Heat Pumps & Mini-Splits
items.description: As a Mitsubishi Diamond Authorized Dealer, we install and service ductless mini-split and heat pump systems for efficient, all-electric comfort.

items.title: HVAC Maintenance & Tune-Ups
items.description: Routine maintenance and seasonal tune-ups that extend equipment life, protect efficiency, and head off breakdowns before they start.

items.title: Indoor Air Quality
items.description: Air quality solutions and ductwork that help your family breathe cleaner, healthier air at home.

items.title: Commercial HVAC
items.description: Service, repair, and installation for commercial spaces across Sonoma and Marin Counties.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message North HVAC Services and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.title: Family-Owned And Operated Since 1988
items.body: Rooted right here in Petaluma, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

items.title: Mitsubishi Diamond Authorized Dealer & Trane
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: CSLB Licensed #1054297
items.body: Properly credentialed, so the work is covered and done to standard.

items.title: A+ Rated With The Better Business Bureau
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Serving Sonoma & Marin Counties From Petaluma
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.quote: It's always a pleasure to work with Chris & Paul. Definitely recommend.
items.author: Verified review · Petaluma

items.quote: Great communication to start! Paul arrived on time and did a great job.
items.author: Verified review · Petaluma

items.quote: The entire project was so pleasant we would give it 10 stars if possible!
items.author: Verified review · Petaluma

sections.heading: Work with North HVAC Services
sections.body: Find us at 3855 Cypress Dr # H, Petaluma, CA 94952. Call (707) 430-3360 — we’re glad to help.
